title: norysca oblongifolia
intro: Norysca oblongifolia, also known as the 'False Fleur de Lis' or 'False Liss', is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Achariaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Norysca oblongifolia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and immune system booster. Norysca oblongifolia is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
